prompt: Create a solution spec: Auto-format client briefs into ready-to-send proposals (freelance copywriters). Target user: Freelance copywriter. Solution: Form + Claude API → formats brief into polished proposal in <60s. Revenue model: pay-per-use or $19/mo
source_idea: Auto-format client briefs into ready-to-send proposals (freelance copywriters)

prompt: Create a solution spec: Competitor price tracker with daily email alerts for small Shopify stores. Target user: E-commerce store owner (Shopify, <$50k/mo). Solution: Scrapes 3–5 competitor URLs daily, sends email digest with price changes. Revenue model: $29/mo subscription
source_idea: Competitor price tracker with daily email alerts for small Shopify stores

prompt: Create a solution spec: One-click video testimonial collection for SaaS founders. Target user: Solo SaaS founder. Solution: Shareable link → customer records short video → auto-hosted, embeddable. Revenue model: $15/mo or $49 lifetime
source_idea: One-click video testimonial collection for SaaS founders
